commands.review_summary:
The PR makes plugin discovery skip top-level script files in global and workspace auto-discovered extension roots while preserving explicit load-path discovery, adding regression tests and docs for the standalone-file path.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +65, Docs +3. Total +75 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the linked issue steps: shipped v2026.5.27 scans top-level script files in auto extension roots, then manifest validation requires openclaw.plugin.json from the candidate root. I did not run a live Gateway start in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer compatibility sign-off, not an automated code repair.
